missing_information_questions.question: What is the project site address or tax lot?
missing_information_questions.reason: Routing and permit applicability cannot be checked without a site identifier.

missing_information_questions.question: What work is being proposed?
missing_information_questions.reason: Permit type, review path, and required forms depend on the work scope.

missing_information_questions.question: What is the current use or occupancy?
missing_information_questions.reason: A change of occupancy may alter review requirements.

missing_information_questions.question: Which plans, forms, or notices are already available for local preview?
missing_information_questions.reason: The agent may preview local documents but must not read private documents unless explicitly provided for this replay.

citation.label: Fixture checklist
citation.quote: Fixture excerpt for local preview routing only.

evidence.title: Fee table fixture
evidence.stale_reason: Retrieved before the current replay window and must not be used for payment or fee guarantees.

evidence.title: Zoning fixture note A
evidence.conflict_reason: Fixture A says a review is required while fixture B says the same review is not required.

evidence.title: Zoning fixture note B
evidence.conflict_reason: Fixture B contradicts fixture A and requires manual confirmation.

manual_handoff_reminders: Confirm stale or conflicting evidence with PP&D staff or the authoritative public source before relying on it.
Review every draft manually before any upload, submission, certification, payment, or scheduling step.
Do not treat this replay as legal, permitting, zoning, fee, deadline, or approval advice.
